scripts.clean: rm -rf .build dist dist-chrome dist-edge dist-chromium dist-firefox
scripts.package: bun run build && bun run package:chrome && bun run package:edge && bun run package:chromium
scripts.package:chrome: bun run build:chrome && tar -czf dist/rzn-browser-extension-chrome.tar.gz -C dist chrome
scripts.package:edge: bun run build:edge && tar -czf dist/rzn-browser-extension-edge.tar.gz -C dist edge
scripts.package:chromium: bun run build:chromium && tar -czf dist/rzn-browser-extension-chromium.tar.gz -C dist chromium
